claims.summary: A compact 12D view can expose warmth, distinction, and context that are hard to inspect in the full representation.
claims.disposition: verify the additive 12D glimpse map and named contextual anchors already present

claims.summary: Compression fidelity and resonance loss need explicit evidence rather than an opaque alternate vector.
claims.disposition: verify fidelity, residual pairing, and resonance-loss diagnostics and tests

claims.summary: The historical 32D-only claim should not overwrite the current 48D contract.
claims.disposition: verify current codec width and captured wire compatibility while preserving the report as historical evidence

claims.summary: The runtime should dynamically switch to or transmit the 12D representation.
claims.disposition: retain as an exact Mike/operator Tier 5 wait because it changes the live semantic transport contract
